tools.name: Scene Cleanup Audit Report
tools.description: Reports duplicate labels, suspicious scales, hidden actors, mobility, collision, missing meshes, and huge bounds.

tools.name: Distribute Selected Actors In Grid
tools.description: Lays out selected actors in a regular grid from the first actor location.

tools.name: Organize Selected Actors By Static Mesh
tools.description: Moves selected Static Mesh actors into Outliner folders based on their mesh asset names.

tools.name: Find Broken Or Suspicious Actors
tools.description: Selects actors with missing mesh refs, bad scale, huge bounds, or hidden editor state.

tools.name: Transform Selected Actors
tools.description: Offsets, rotates, and scales selected actors in one transaction.
tools.code:
# Param: offset_x | float | 0 | X Offset | step=10
# Param: offset_y | float | 0 | Y Offset | step=10
# Param: offset_z | float | 0 | Z Offset | step=10
# Param: yaw_degrees | float | 0 | Yaw Degrees | min=-360 | max=360 | step=1
# Param: scale_multiplier | float | 1.0 | Scale Multiplier | min=0.01 | max=100 | step=0.1
import unreal

offset_x = {{offset_x}}
offset_y = {{offset_y}}
offset_z = {{offset_z}}
yaw_degrees = {{yaw_degrees}}
scale_multiplier = {{scale_multiplier}}

actor_subsystem = unreal.get_editor_subsystem(unreal.EditorActorSubsystem)
selected_actors = [actor for actor in actor_subsystem.get_selected_level_actors() if actor is not None]

if not selected_actors:
    unreal.log_warning("No actors are selected.")
else:
    changed_count = 0
    offset = unreal.Vector(offset_x, offset_y, offset_z)

    with unreal.ScopedEditorTransaction("Transform Selected Actors"):
        for actor in selected_actors:
            actor.modify()

            location = actor.get_actor_location()
            actor.set_actor_location(location + offset, False, False)

            rotation = actor.get_actor_rotation()
            actor.set_actor_rotation(
                unreal.Rotator(rotation.pitch, rotation.yaw + yaw_degrees, rotation.roll),
                False,
            )

            current_scale = actor.get_actor_scale3d()
            actor.set_actor_scale3d(
                unreal.Vector(
                    current_scale.x * scale_multiplier,
                    current_scale.y * scale_multiplier,
                    current_scale.z * scale_multiplier,
                )
            )
            changed_count += 1

    unreal.log(
        f"Transformed {changed_count} selected actor(s): "
        f"offset={offset}, yaw={yaw_degrees}, scale_multiplier={scale_multiplier}."
    )

tools.name: Randomize Selected Transform
tools.description: Adds random XY/Z offset, yaw, and uniform scale to selected actors.
tools.code:
# Param: xy_jitter | float | 0 | XY Location Jitter | min=0 | step=10
# Param: z_jitter | float | 0 | Z Location Jitter | min=0 | step=10
# Param: min_yaw | float | -15 | Min Yaw | min=-360 | max=360 | step=1
# Param: max_yaw | float | 15 | Max Yaw | min=-360 | max=360 | step=1
# Param: min_scale | float | 1.0 | Min Scale | min=0.01 | max=100 | step=0.1
# Param: max_scale | float | 1.0 | Max Scale | min=0.01 | max=100 | step=0.1
import random
import unreal

xy_jitter = {{xy_jitter}}
z_jitter = {{z_jitter}}
min_yaw = {{min_yaw}}
max_yaw = {{max_yaw}}
min_scale = {{min_scale}}
max_scale = {{max_scale}}

if min_yaw > max_yaw:
    min_yaw, max_yaw = max_yaw, min_yaw
    unreal.log_warning("Min Yaw was greater than Max Yaw. Values were swapped.")

if min_scale > max_scale:
    min_scale, max_scale = max_scale, min_scale
    unreal.log_warning("Min Scale was greater than Max Scale. Values were swapped.")

actor_subsystem = unreal.get_editor_subsystem(unreal.EditorActorSubsystem)
selected_actors = [actor for actor in actor_subsystem.get_selected_level_actors() if actor is not None]

if not selected_actors:
    unreal.log_warning("No actors are selected.")
else:
    changed_count = 0
    with unreal.ScopedEditorTransaction("Randomize Selected Transform"):
        for actor in selected_actors:
            actor.modify()

            location = actor.get_actor_location()
            random_offset = unreal.Vector(
                random.uniform(-xy_jitter, xy_jitter),
                random.uniform(-xy_jitter, xy_jitter),
                random.uniform(-z_jitter, z_jitter),
            )
            actor.set_actor_location(location + random_offset, False, False)

            rotation = actor.get_actor_rotation()
            yaw = random.uniform(min_yaw, max_yaw)
            actor.set_actor_rotation(unreal.Rotator(rotation.pitch, rotation.yaw + yaw, rotation.roll), False)

            scale_multiplier = random.uniform(min_scale, max_scale)
            current_scale = actor.get_actor_scale3d()
            actor.set_actor_scale3d(
                unreal.Vector(
                    current_scale.x * scale_multiplier,
                    current_scale.y * scale_multiplier,
                    current_scale.z * scale_multiplier,
                )
            )
            changed_count += 1

    unreal.log(f"Randomized transform for {changed_count} selected actor(s).")

tools.name: Snap Selected Actors To Ground
tools.description: Line-traces downward from each selected actor pivot and moves the actor location to the hit point.

tools.name: Move Selected Actors To Folder
tools.description: Moves selected actors to a World Outliner folder.

tools.name: Rename Selected Actors Pattern
tools.description: Renames selected actors using prefix, index, padding, and suffix.

tools.name: Replace Text In Selected Actor Labels
tools.description: Replaces text in selected actor labels with optional case sensitivity.

tools.name: Set Selected Collision Profile
tools.description: Sets collision profile name on primitive components owned by selected actors.

tools.name: Select Same Static Mesh As Selected
tools.description: Selects all level actors that use the same Static Mesh asset as the current selection.

tools.name: Set Selected Actors Mobility
tools.description: Sets mobility for components owned by selected actors.

tools.name: Flatten Selected Actors To Same Z
tools.description: Moves selected actors to a shared Z height while preserving X/Y.

tools.name: Reset Bad Scale On Selected Actors
tools.description: Resets selected actors whose scale is zero or negative to a safe uniform scale.
